---
title: "API 222 Section Materials"
from: markdown+emoji
format:
  html:
    toc: false
page-layout: full
---

<style>

.section-cmd {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.72rem;
color: #aaa;
letter-spacing: 0.08em;
margin: 2.5rem 0 0;
padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e4e4;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 6px;
}
.section-cmd .ps { color: #16a34a; }

.m-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }

.m-item {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 72px 1fr;
gap: 0 1.25rem;
padding: 6px 0;
border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
align-items: baseline;
}
.m-item:first-child { border-top: 1px solid #f0f0f0; }

.m-num {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.68rem;
color: #888;
letter-spacing: 0.03em;
white-space: nowrap;
padding-top: 1px;
line-height: 1.5;
}

.m-body {
font-size: 0.84rem;
font-weight: 300;
color: #333;
line-height: 1.5;
display: flex;
align-items: baseline;
flex-wrap: wrap;
gap: 0 0.4rem;
}

.m-body a {
color: #111;
text-decoration: underline;
text-decoration-color: #e0e0e0;
text-underline-offset: 2px;
}
.m-body a:hover { color: #16a34a; text-decoration-color: #16a34a; }

.m-sep {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.67rem;
color: #ccc;
}

.m-sub {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.67rem;
color: #888;
}

.m-link {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.65rem;
letter-spacing: 0.04em;
padding: 1px 8px;
border-radius: 2px;
text-decoration: none !important;
transition: all 0.12s;
background: #111;
color: #fff !important;
white-space: nowrap;
}
.m-link:hover { background: #16a34a !important; color: #fff !important; text-decoration: none !important; }

.about-note {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.72rem;
color: #888;
line-height: 1.75;
margin-top: 2rem;
padding-top: 1rem;
border-top: 1px solid #e4e4e4;
}

</style>

Section materials for API-222 covering statistical learning, machine learning methods, and their applications in policy analysis. Materials build on contributions from previous TFs including Ibou Dieye, Laura Morris, Emily Mower, and Amy Wickett.

---

<div class="section-cmd"><span class="ps">$</span> ls sections/</div>

<div class="m-list">

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">section-01</div>
<div class="m-body">
Intro to API 222 and R
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">vectors, matrices, data frames, basic operations</span>
&nbsp;<a href="section 1/section1.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">section-02</div>
<div class="m-body">
KNN and Linear Regression
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">k-nearest neighbors, predictive modeling fundamentals</span>
&nbsp;<a href="section 2/section2.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">section-03</div>
<div class="m-body">
Linear Regression Exercises
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">inference, model fitting, interpretation</span>
&nbsp;<a href="section 3/section3.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">section-04</div>
<div class="m-body">
Classification
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">logistic regression, LDA, performance metrics</span>
&nbsp;<a href="section 4/section 4.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">section-05</div>
<div class="m-body">
Cross-Validation, Ridge, Lasso, and Bootstrapping
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">resampling, regularization</span>
&nbsp;<a href="section 5/section 5.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">section-06</div>
<div class="m-body">
Regularization and Dimension Reduction
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">PCA, PCR, advanced regularization</span>
&nbsp;<a href="section 6/section 6.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">section-07</div>
<div class="m-body">
Non-linear Models
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">polynomial regression, splines, local regression</span>
&nbsp;<a href="section 7/section 7.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">section-08</div>
<div class="m-body">
Tree-Based Methods
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">decision trees, bagging, random forests, boosting</span>
&nbsp;<a href="section 8/section 8.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">section-09</div>
<div class="m-body">
Support Vector Machines
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">SVMs, classifiers, kernel approaches</span>
&nbsp;<a href="section 9/section 9.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">section-10</div>
<div class="m-body">
Neural Networks and Deep Learning
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">deep learning architectures, reinforcement learning</span>
&nbsp;<a href="section 10/section 10.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

</div>
